{{Quote|Evil old man! How dare you defile the House of Kira?|Lady Kira to Palpatine|<ref name="EE2">[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]]</ref>}}
[[Lady/Legends|Lady]] '''Kira''' was the wife of [[Modon Kira (Galactic Civil War)|Modon Kira]] and the [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]. She offered shelter to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] during [[Operation Shadow Hand]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]] {{1st}}
